tabs.files.label: Files
settings.edit.mode.label: Edit Mode
settings.edit.mode.description: Select the edit tool variant (replace, patch, hashline, or apply_patch)
settings.edit.fuzzyMatch.label: Fuzzy Match
settings.edit.fuzzyMatch.description: Accept high-confidence fuzzy matches for whitespace differences
settings.edit.fuzzyThreshold.label: Fuzzy Match Threshold
settings.edit.fuzzyThreshold.description: Similarity threshold (0-1) for accepting fuzzy matches
settings.edit.streamingAbort.label: Abort on Failed Preview
settings.edit.streamingAbort.description: Abort streaming edit tool calls when patch preview fails
settings.edit.blockAutoGenerated.label: Block Auto-Generated Files
settings.edit.blockAutoGenerated.descrip: Prevent editing of files that appear to be auto-generated (protoc, sqlc, swagger, etc.)
settings.readLineNumbers.label: Line Numbers
settings.readLineNumbers.description: Prepend line numbers to read tool output by default
settings.read.defaultLimit.label: Default Read Limit
settings.read.defaultLimit.description: Default number of lines returned when agent calls read without a limit
settings.read.summarize.enabled.label: Read Summaries
settings.read.summarize.enabled.descript: Return structural code summaries when read is called without an explicit selector
settings.read.summarize.prose.label: Prose Summaries
settings.read.summarize.prose.descriptio: Return structural summaries for Markdown and plain text reads
settings.read.summarize.minBodyLines.des: Minimum multiline body or literal length before read summaries collapse it
Minimum multiline block comment length before read summaries collapse it
settings.read.summarize.minTotalLines.de: Files with fewer total lines are read verbatim instead of structurally summarized
settings.read.summarize.unfoldUntil.desc: BFS-unfold elidable spans until the summary is at least this many visible lines. 0 keeps only the outermost elisions.
settings.read.summarize.unfoldLimit.desc: Hard ceiling on summary size while BFS-unfolding. An unfold whose revealed lines would exceed this is skipped (that span stays folded) and unfolding continues with the remaining spans.
settings.read.toolResultPreview.label: Inline Read Previews
settings.read.toolResultPreview.descript: Render read tool results inline in the transcript instead of summary rows
settings.lsp.enabled.label: LSP
settings.lsp.enabled.description: Enable the lsp tool for code intelligence (definitions, references, diagnostics, rename)
settings.lsp.lazy.label: Lazy LSP Startup
settings.lsp.lazy.description: Start language servers on first use (lsp tool or editing a matching file type) instead of at session startup
settings.lsp.formatOnWrite.label: Format on Write
settings.lsp.formatOnWrite.description: Automatically format code files using LSP after writing
settings.lsp.diagnosticsOnWrite.label: Diagnostics on Write
settings.lsp.diagnosticsOnWrite.descript: Return LSP diagnostics after writing code files
settings.lsp.diagnosticsOnEdit.label: Diagnostics on Edit
settings.lsp.diagnosticsOnEdit.descripti: Return LSP diagnostics after editing code files
settings.lsp.diagnosticsDeduplicate.desc: Suppress post-edit LSP diagnostics already shown for a file; only surface new or changed ones
